sections.title: Before attempting to run past the Bolt Traps

lines.speaker: weast side49
lines.text: How am I supposed to get past this?

sections.title: When getting hit by a bolt
After making past the Bolt Traps

lines.speaker: weast side49
lines.text: Did that owl statue just move?

lines.speaker: weast side49
lines.text: I can't wait until I get full graceful, then I can head back to the rooftop courses.

lines.speaker: weast side49
lines.text: I wonder if the Hallowed grapple is worth it?

lines.speaker: weast side49
lines.text: I wish I could trade Hallowed marks in for amylase crystals.

lines.speaker: weast side49
lines.text: Two pieces dyed, four more to go!

lines.speaker: weast side49
lines.text: Well, this is definitely more difficult than training on rooftop courses.
